name: STABLE
description: Stable is mortgage market infrastructure bringing real-world assets onchain. Stable is building USDX, a mortgage-backed stablecoin designed to modernize the $13 trillion U.S. mortgage market. Backed by U.S. residential mortgages and issued onchain, USDX enables access to yield by providing liquidity and programmable credit. Stable bridges traditional mortgage finance with DeFi and global capital markets while unlocking scalable, transparent real-world asset adoption.
